title: lita caerulea
intro: Lita caerulea, also known as Blue Lotus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the water lily family and is native to ancient Egypt and other parts of Africa. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal and psychoactive properties, including its ability to induce a state of relaxation and reduce anxiety. The medicinal properties of Lita caerulea include its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Blue Lotus include extracts and tinctures, which can be consumed in various forms, including teas and capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve mood.
